---
title: "Amelia Chamberlayne"
---

## Amelia Chamberlayne

**Dates:** (<i>c</i>. 1807-1898)

**Maiden name:** (Onslow)

### Description

neighbour of CMY

### Biography

She married (6 Sept 1830) Thomas Chamberlayne, of Cranbury Park, Otterbourne.  Considering how close they lived to CMY for so many years, there are comparatively few references to the Chamberlayne family.

### Letters

- Letter from Midsummer Day [21 June 1897]
- Letter from Jan 31st  [1870]
- Letter from August 6, 1838

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
